headline: Sizey S swell at a good angle, but cross-on wind keeps it textured.
today: Best size of the region at 3.6-4ft and the angle's actually decent, but the SW cross-on is on it from dawn and only gets worse into the onshore evening. No clean window really — earliest morning is your best shot before it deteriorates. Fish or shortboard if you want to make something of the bump.

daysToWatch.note: The one to plan around: 2.5-3ft at a good angle with N offshore dawn and morning. Clean and fun early — get it before the afternoon onshore. Shortboard or fish.
Smaller at 1.3-2ft but prime SSE angle and light dawn wind. Loggable glass early; onshore-ish by afternoon.
